      Apple AirPods 4 Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Headphones, Personalized Spatial Audio, Sweat and Water Resistant, USB-C Charging Case, H2 Chip, Up to 30 Hours of Battery Life, Effortless Setup for iPhone

      Noise Control Sound Isolation

      About this item

      • REBUILT FOR COMFORT — AirPods 4 have been redesigned for exceptional all-day comfort and greater stability. With a refined contour, shorter stem, and quick-press controls for music or calls.
      • PERSONALIZED SPATIAL AUDIO — Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you, creating a theater-like listening experience for music, TV shows, movies, games, and more.*
      • IMPROVED SOUND AND CALL QUALITY — AirPods 4 feature the Apple-designed H2 chip. Voice Isolation improves the quality of phone calls in loud conditions. Using advanced computational audio, it reduces background noise while isolating and clarifying the sound of your voice for whomever you’re speaking to.*
      • MAGICAL EXPERIENCE — Just say “Siri” or “Hey Siri” to play a song, make a call, or check your schedule.* And with Siri Interactions, now you can respond to Siri by simply nodding your head yes or shaking your head no.* Pair AirPods 4 by simply placing them near your device and tapping Connect on your screen.* Easily share a song or show between two sets of AirPods.* An optical in-ear sensor knows to play audio only when you’re wearing AirPods and pauses when you take them off. And you can track down your AirPods and Charging Case with the Find My app.*
      • LONG BATTERY LIFE — Get up to 5 hours of listening time on a single charge. And get up to 30 hours of total listening time using the case.*
      • REDESIGNED CASE — The Charging Case comes with USB-C charging capabilities and is more than 10 percent smaller by volume than the previous generation.*
      • DUST, SWEAT, AND WATER RESISTANT — AirPods 4 and the Charging Case are rated IP54 dust, sweat, and water resistant, so they’ll withstand rain and heavy workouts.*
      • LEGAL DISCLAIMERS — This is a summary of the main product features. See below to learn more.
      › See more product details

      Technical Details

      Apple AirPods 4

      Size and Weight
      • AirPods 4 (each)
        • Height: 1.19 inches (30.2 mm)
        • Width: 0.72 inch (18.3 mm)
        • Depth: 0.71 inch (18.1 mm)
        • Weight: 0.15 ounce (4.3 grams)
      • Charging Case (USB-C)
        • Height: 1.82 inches (46.2 mm)
        • Width: 1.97 inches (50.1 mm)
        • Depth: 0.83 inch (21.2 mm)
        • Weight: 1.14 ounces (32.3 grams)

      Charging Case
      • Works with USB‑C connector

      Battery
      • AirPods 4
        • Up to 5 hours of listening time on a single charge
        • Up to 4.5 hours of talk time on a single charge
      • AirPods 4 with Charging Case (USB-C)
        • Up to 30 hours of listening time
        • Up to 20 hours of talk time
        • 5 minutes in the case provides around 1 hour of listening time or around 45 minutes of talk time

      Audio Technology
      • Custom high-excursion Apple driver
      • Custom high dynamic range amplifier
      • Voice Isolation
      • Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking
      • Adaptive EQ
      • Vent system for pressure equalization

      Controls
      • Press once to play or pause media
      • Press once to answer a call or mute or unmute
      • Press twice to end a call
      • Press twice to skip forward
      • Press three times to skip back
      • Press and hold for Siri
      • Say “Hey Siri” or just “Siri” to do things like play a song, make a call, or get directions
      • With Siri Interactions, nod your head yes or gently shake your head no when Siri asks if you want to answer an incoming call, hear a text message, manage notifications, and more

      Sensors
      • Dual beamforming microphones
      • Inward-facing microphone
      • Optical in-ear sensor
      • Motion-detecting accelerometer
      • Speech-detecting accelerometer
      • Force sensor

      Chip
      • H2 headphone chip

      Dust Sweat and Water Resistant
      • Dust, sweat, and water resistant (IP54)

      Connectivity
      • Bluetooth 5.3 wireless technology

      In the Box
      • AirPods 4
      • Charging Case (USB-C)
      • Documentation
      • USB-C Charge Cable sold separately

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find these wireless earbuds excellent in sound quality, with one mentioning the spatial audio feature, and appreciate their great quality and noise cancellation capabilities. The functionality works well, and customers consider them worth the price. The battery life receives mixed feedback - while some say it lasts a long time, others report it won't keep a charge. Customers disagree on the fit, with some finding it nice while others say it's not great, and many report issues with the earbuds falling out of their ears.

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      Beginners Guide to Purchasing AirPods:
      Here’s my take on what AirPods you should buy if you’ve never bought a pair: AirPods 4: a great low-cost option and low risk if you’ve never had AirPods before. As for noise cancelling (ANC) versus non noise cancelling, the ANC here isn’t great and I wouldn’t buy these solely for that. Rather, look to the ANC here if you’ve tried the Pro versions and know that for whatever reason they do not work for you but you still want Apple noise cancelling AirPods. Though if you need ANC and the Pro series don’t fit in your ears I would look to Sony or elsewhere because you may be disappointed with these due to the lack of ear-tips sealing your ears for the best ANC performance, like the Pro series does. AirPods Pro 2/3: I’ve only owned AirPods Pro 1 and 2. The first generation pods never stayed in my ears, they’d slowly fall out no matter what. I ended up giving them to a family member. The Pro 2 introduced new XXS ear tips which solved the fit option for me and now they work great. Though, I use both the Pro 2 and 4 intermittently for different reasons. The Pro 2 are great for movies, content, music, though they still start to get uncomfortable or fall out if I’m eating or talking. The AirPods 4 work well for those specific scenarios, when I’m eating or talking on the phone for brief moments. If you have the money to spare, try the Pro AirPods and if they don’t fit or work, circle back to these. AirPods Max: Avoid at all cost, I’ve never owned these to be completely transparent, but they are extremely outdated and due for a massive update really any day now. They have worse performance than the AirPods Pro 2/3 at 2x the price. I’ll also note, these are frequently on sale, so grab them when they’re 20-30% off and it’s a steal.

      Top reviews from the United States

      There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

      • Dylan Manzanares
        5.0 out of 5 stars Exactly as expected! (A subjective review, duh)
        Reviewed in the United States on October 21, 2024
        Style: With Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+Verified Purchase
        I never take the time to write reviews because why spend so much time on something that will ultimately have no effect on my life? Well in this case, these Airpods have met and exceeded every single one of my expectations and I figured that was worth writing about.

        Important disclaimers:
        - OF COURSE this is a subjective opinion, because that is all a review is. Take it with a grain of salt.
        - Different products work better or worse for different people, it's just that simple.
        - When talking about noise cancelling headphones, it's important to consider them for what they are, not what we think they SHOULD be.

        THE FIT:
        OKAY. I am someone who has very small ear cannals. I have spent years trying to find earbuds that fit my ears comfortably. Silicone in-ear tips have always been extremely uncomfortable for me. That being said, I did own the first gen Airpods Pro for a couple of years before buying these Airpods 4. I wanted earbuds that I could exercise with, use for commuting, and use for blocking out sound when I'm at school or on an airplane. The airpods pro fit the bill, but I could only wear them for short periods of time before they would start to seriously hurt. On top of that, they would always slowly come out of my ears. It didn't matter what size of eartips I used. My ears are just NOT made for in-ear silicone tips. BUT THESE AIRPODS 4!!! Holy smokes they are so comfortable. They never fall out. I can wear them for hours at a time and not even notice them. I haven't worn a pair of Airpods this comfortable since the gen 2 Airpods. The 3's didn't work for me either, but somehow apple really cooked up the ideal fit for these Airpods 4.

        THE NOISE CANCELLATION:
        Okay. Obviously, these are NOT going to have the same level of noise reduction as in-ear earbuds because there is no seal created by any silicone tips. If Airpods Pros and silicone tips have always worked for you, just buy those. However, considering that the noise cancellation in these Airpods is ALL driven by software, I have been extremely impressed with the results. It reduces the white noise of annoying sounds like public trains, airplanes, etc. very effectively. While voices and other louder sounds aren't cancelled completely, when music is playing through the earbuds these noises are quite enough to hardly notice. For me, that's enough. I don't need complete silence, I have my over-ear noise cancelling headphones for that.

        THE SOUND QUALITY:
        When I say that I was blown away the first time I listened to music on these Airpods, I was NOT kidding. The amount of bass that they managed to pack in to such small, open-eared earbuds is frankly impressive. The sound profile allows for an incredible listening experience no matter what genre of music you listen to (I listen to a wide range of pop, folk, indie, and rap primarily).

        THE OVERALL VERDICT:
        These Airpods 4 with Active Noise Cancellation are exactly as I expected them to be. They fit extremely well, the ANC is very acceptable for what they are, and they sound amazing. That's not to mention the TINY case that they come in, making them so easy to slip anywhere. I have been looking for a solid pair of earbuds with ANC that work with my ears for the longest time now. I'm happy to say that these are everything I've ever wanted. If you have had issues with silicone ear-tip earbuds fitting you properly, then these are definitely worth a shot!
        Read more
        825 people found this helpful

         Report
      • Jeff Stokes
        5.0 out of 5 stars Wife Loves Them — Comfortable and Impressive Sound
        Reviewed in the United States on March 2, 2026
        Style: With Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+Verified Purchase
        Picked these up for my wife, and they’ve been a hit. Setup was seamless with her Apple devices, and they paired quickly without any hassle. The sound quality is clear and balanced, with strong voice clarity for calls and good overall depth for music and podcasts.

        She especially appreciates the Active Noise Cancellation, which noticeably reduces background noise without making everything feel unnatural. They’re comfortable enough for extended wear and stay in place well during normal daily activity. Battery life has also been solid for everyday use.

        There haven’t been any complaints so far. For someone already in the Apple ecosystem who wants reliable performance and effective noise control, these have been an excellent choice.

      • Mary
        5.0 out of 5 stars Very small, good battery life, good call quality!
        Reviewed in the United States on February 16, 2026
        Style: Without Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+Verified Purchase
        Small but great quality! Can be well hidden under your hair, so good for sneaking your airpods into class or work lol. Battery span in one use is very good too! My old airpod pros would last maybe 6 hours out of my 7 hour shift and then completely drain my fully charged case. The call quality sounded so dog poop as well. You'd think these would've worse since they're cheaper, but with a fully charged case, these lasted me all 7 hours with battery still left! The sound quality for calls is also very good! I definitely recommend if you're looking for an 'affordable' pair of name brands. You could definitely get something way better for cheaper, but if you care about name brands or stuff like that, these are a good fit.

        Small but great quality! Can be well hidden under your hair, so good for sneaking your airpods into class or work lol. Battery span in one use is very good too! My old airpod pros would last maybe 6 hours out of my 7 hour shift and then completely drain my fully charged case. The call quality sounded so dog poop as well. You'd think these would've worse since they're cheaper, but with a fully charged case, these lasted me all 7 hours with battery still left! The sound quality for calls is also very good! I definitely recommend if you're looking for an 'affordable' pair of name brands. You could definitely get something way better for cheaper, but if you care about name brands or stuff like that, these are a good fit.
        Images in this review
        32 people found this helpful
        Helpful

      • W.MurphyW.
        5.0 out of 5 stars Excellent add-on's - Pricey
        Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026
        Style: With Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+Verified Purchase
        The ANR feature on this model, is fabulous, but energy hungry. Excellent add-on's in a moving vehicle for taking calls, listening to tunes, and enjoyment of communications over a long period of time. Good fit. Durable. Easy to hook up to your mobile device. These are not a good value for the money, as they are Apply pricey and expensive, however, if you are going to spoil yourself or others who appreciate excellent fidelity, then go for it. I love the case on these as they have contactless charging. Nice features. Pretty good add-on. Works for AppleTV in the living room too....

         Report
      • MaraJade77
        4.0 out of 5 stars Perfect for me
        Reviewed in the United States on January 13, 2026
        Style: Without Active Noise CancellationSet: Without AppleCare+Verified Purchase
        Pros- Simple to use, connects easily, sounds great, no app required.
        Cons- Not as comfortable as the old original buds and may not stay in while working out.

        These paired to my iPhone immediately as soon as I opened the box and have worked seamlessly ever since, no app required. I had been using my old corded Apple earbuds, which I always found the most comfortable so I decided on the AirPod 4 because they have a similar shape. They’re not quite as comfortable as the older ones and they don’t fit as well, but it’s not too bad. I don’t think I’d recommend them for running or working out though because they’re a little on the big side (for me at least) and I don’t think they would stay put.
        There’s definitely an upgrade in the sound quality from my old ones, which is another reason why I chose these. I can’t say whether or not they’re good for phone calls because I don’t use them for that at all, but for music they sound pretty good.
        FYI, they don’t come with a charging cable and I didn’t have any USB-C cables so I had to buy one (for the price of these, it’s kind of annoying that they couldn’t include a cable!)
        Overall I think these are a good option if you’re looking for something in the middle price range, they’re not cheap, but they’re also not as expensive as the newest AirPods.
        Read more
